entry.title: Entry #704 in Kadrey v. Meta Platforms, Inc., 3:23-cv-03417
entry.summary: Pro Hac Vice

entry.title: Entry #703 in Kadrey v. Meta Platforms, Inc., 3:23-cv-03417
entry.summary: ORDER re Outstanding Sealing Motions. The parties are ordered to file a table summarizing the outstanding motions to seal by 4/8/26. A template for this chart can be found in the Standing Orders section of Judge Chhabria's website. Signed by Judge Vince Chhabria on 4/1/26. (This is a text-only entry generated by the court. There is no document associated with this entry.) (vclc2, COURT STAFF) (Filed on 4/1/2026) (Entered: 04/01/2026)

entry.title: Minute entry from 2026-04-01 in Kadrey v. Meta Platforms, Inc., 3:23-cv-03417
entry.summary: Order

entry.title: Entry #702 in Kadrey v. Meta Platforms, Inc., 3:23-cv-03417
entry.summary: AMENDED COMPLAINT Fourth Amended Consolidated Complaint against Meta Platforms, Inc.. Filed by Christopher Farnsworth, Rachel Louise Snyder, David Henry Hwang, Sarah Silverman, Andrew Sean Greer, Richard Kadrey, Ta-Nehisi Coates, Matthew Klam, Junot Diaz, Laura Lippman, Christopher Golden, Lysa TerKeurst, Jacqueline Woodson, Eleven Eleven O' Clock Corporation, BCP Literary, Inc., Daring Greatly Corporation. (Boies, David) (Filed on 4/1/2026) (Entered: 04/01/2026)

entry.title: Minute entry from 2026-03-26 in Kadrey v. Meta Platforms, Inc., 3:23-cv-03417
entry.summary: Set Deadlines/Hearings: Opening Reports due by 9/18/2026. Rebuttal Reports due by 10/16/2026. Reply Expert Reports due by 10/30/2026. Close of Expert Discovery due by 11/20/2026. Deadline for Summary Judgment Brief 1 (Plaintiffs Opening Brief) due by 12/11/2026. Deadline for Summary Judgment Brief 2 (Defendants Opening Brief & Opposition) due by 1/11/2027. Deadline for Summary Judgment Brief 3 (Plaintiffs Opposition & Reply) due by 1/29/2027. Deadline for Summary Judgment Brief 4 (Defendants Reply) due by 2/12/2027. Dispositive Motion Hearing set for 2/25/2027 at 10:00 AM in San Francisco, Courtroom 04, 17th Floor before Judge Vince Chhabria. (bxs, COURT STAFF) (Filed on 3/26/2026)

entry.title: Minute entry from 2026-03-26 in Kadrey v. Meta Platforms, Inc., 3:23-cv-03417
entry.summary: Set Deadlines/Hearings

entry.title: Entry #680 in Kadrey v. Meta Platforms, Inc., 3:23-cv-03417
entry.summary: Transcript of Proceedings held on February 5, 2026, before Judge Vince Chhabria. Court Reporter, Marla F. Knox, RPR, CRR, RMR, telephone number (602) 391-6990/email marla_knox@cand.uscourts.gov. Per General Order No. 59 and Judicial Conference policy, this transcript may be viewed only at the Clerk's Office public terminal or may be purchased through the Court Reporter/Transcriber until the deadline for the Release of Transcript Restriction. After that date it may be obtained through PACER. Any Notice of Intent to Request Redaction, if required, is due no later than 5 business days from date of this filing. (Re 676 Transcript Order ) Release of Transcript Restriction set for 5/13/2026. (Related documents(s) 676 ) (Knox, Marla) (Filed on 2/12/2026) (Entered: 02/12/2026)
